query: where is the command-line argument parser defined for the CLI
why: uses clap derive macros to define Cli struct and Command subcommands (memorize, note, remember, learn, consolidate, reflect, forget, config)

query: how are errors propagated and converted to user-facing messages
why: defines thiserror enum with I/O, YAML parse, missing frontmatter, and other error types; CLI uses anyhow for context stacking

query: where is the embedding model downloaded and invoked for vector generation
why: CandleEmbedder trait implementation that loads HuggingFace model (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) and generates 384-dim embeddings

query: how does the system determine which memories to surface given a query
why: rerank.rs implements RecallProfile calibration and multi-signal reranking (semantic + temporal); temporal.rs computes time-decay and frequency-based scores

query: where is the in-memory staging area for quick notes defined
why: Inbox struct with capacity-limited items list; FileSource metadata for learn items; JSON persistence in .inbox.json

query: how are memory files structured with frontmatter and body content
why: MemoryFile and Frontmatter structs; YAML frontmatter parsing with name, type, strength, access_count, refs; body is markdown

query: where is the main entry point and how does it dispatch to subcommands
why: main() function parses CLI args, routes to run(), which matches Command enum and executes memorize/note/remember/learn/consolidate/reflect/forget/config logic

query: how does the system read and index source code files into the knowledge base
why: ChunkingStrategy trait with Chunk struct (file, start_line, end_line, content, id); supports ParagraphChunking and FixedLineChunking strategies

query: where is the hierarchical navigable small world graph index implemented
why: HnswIndex struct with multi-layer proximity graph, configurable m/ef_construction/ef_search parameters; used for approximate nearest neighbor search

query: how are configuration files loaded and applied across global and project scopes
why: Config struct with load_global() and load_with_project(); deep_merge applies project mnemonist.toml over ~/.mnemonist/mnemonist.toml; get/set use dot-notation keys

query: how does vector quantization reduce storage footprint of embeddings
why: TurboQuant algorithms (MSE and Prod); QuantizationConfig in config.rs controls bits (1-4) and algorithm selection

query: where is the live progress renderer that displays carriage-return updates on stderr
why: StderrProgress struct implements Progress trait; draw() function renders phase/progress bar with TUI colors; tick() throttles updates at ~15fps

query: where is distance computation between vectors implemented for similarity search
why: cosine_similarity, dot_product, l2_distance_squared, and normalize functions; used by HNSW and reranker for nearest neighbor search

query: how are memory consolidation rules applied during the sleep cycle
why: ConsolidationConfig struct defines decay_days, merge_threshold, protected_access_count, max_memories; CLI consolidate command applies these during reorganization

query: where are integration tests validating CLI output and memory operations
why: runs mnemonist CLI in isolated HOME; validates JSON output format and exit codes for memorize/note/remember/reflect operations

query: how does the system follow inter-layer references between code and memories
why: Frontmatter.refs field contains cross-layer edges (code chunk IDs like 'file:start:end' or memory filenames); enable recall expansion in RecallConfig
